name: Weepy Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Head lettuce, chopped into small chunks
1/2 to 1 cup mayonnaise for a thin spread
1 Red onion (or white), sliced very thin
1 1/2 cups cooked peas, fresh or frozen
1 1/2 cups Swiss cheese, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Place one third of the lettuce chunks at the bottom of a bowl.
2. Spread a few spoonfuls of mayonnaise over the lettuce.
3. Layer one third of the onion slices on top.
4. Sprinkle lightly with sugar (about 1 teaspoon) to prevent the onions from weeping.
5. Add one third of the peas, followed by one third of the cheese.
6. Repeat layers twice more.
7. Cover and chill for 2-3 hours.
8. Before serving, sprinkle bacon over top. Do not toss.
Yield: 4 servings
